title: invoice — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — customer sees own invoices via invoice.enforce_customer_scope; admin + finance role manage tenant-wide invoices; ops role sees read-only view for support. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant support tooling for ops + support. All tenant-plane permissions carry the `invoice.` prefix (or `platform.invoice.` on the platform audience) per hierarchy.md §4 audience-boundary rules. Financial actions (create, finalize, void, mark-uncollectible, issue credit note) require BOTH admin role AND finance sub-role for defense-in-depth.

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.viewMine
permissions.description: Customer sees own invoices via invoice.enforce_customer_scope middleware.

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.create
permissions.description: Create a new draft invoice. Finance + admin only.

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.update
permissions.description: Update a DRAFT invoice (lines, addresses). Post-finalize is immutable regardless.

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.finalize
permissions.description: Transition status draft → open. Freezes totals + generates PDF + sends email.

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.send
permissions.description: Initial email delivery of a finalized invoice.

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.resend
permissions.description: Re-send the invoice email (customer lost it, wrong address, etc.).

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.void
permissions.description: Void a draft or open invoice. Refused after payment — use credit note instead.

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.mark-uncollectible
permissions.description: Mark a past-due invoice uncollectible after dunning ladder exhausted. Bad-debt write-off.

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.mark-paid
permissions.description: Manual reconciliation. Records that the payment arrived via check / wire / cash. Admin + finance only.

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.regenerate-pdf
permissions.description: Regenerate the invoice PDF (e.g. after tenant branding update).

permissions.name: invoice.invoices.mark-viewed
permissions.description: Customer marks their own invoice viewed. Also fired by the email-tracking pixel.

permissions.name: invoice.lines.create
permissions.description: Add a line item to a DRAFT invoice.

permissions.name: invoice.lines.update
permissions.description: Edit a line item on a DRAFT invoice.

permissions.name: invoice.lines.delete
permissions.description: Remove a line item from a DRAFT invoice.

permissions.name: invoice.credit-notes.viewMine
permissions.description: Customer sees own credit notes.

permissions.name: invoice.credit-notes.create
permissions.description: Issue a credit note against a paid/partially-paid invoice. Finance + admin only.

permissions.name: invoice.credit-notes.apply
permissions.description: Apply a credit note (to refund / next invoice / customer balance).

permissions.name: invoice.credit-notes.void
permissions.description: Void a DRAFT credit note only. Issued/applied credit notes are immutable.

permissions.name: invoice.reports.aging.view
permissions.description: View the invoice aging report (0-30 / 31-60 / 61-90 / 91+ buckets).

permissions.name: invoice.reports.revenue.view
permissions.description: View the revenue report (aggregated by period + item type).

permissions.name: invoice.reports.tax-collected.view
permissions.description: View the tax-collected report (grouped by tax jurisdiction — VAT/GST returns).

permissions.name: platform.invoice.invoices.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant invoice list (redacted PII by default).

permissions.name: platform.invoice.pii.view
permissions.description: Unmasked customer PII on cross-tenant invoice view. Escalation-only.

permissions.name: platform.invoice.reports.revenue-cross-tenant.view
permissions.description: Aggregated revenue across all tenants. Powers platform-level financial dashboards.
